title: The Alphabet
content:
# The Alphabet

In this lesson, we will learn the English alphabet.

## The Vowels
There are 5 vowels in English:
A, E, I, O, U

## The Consonants
The other 21 letters are consonants, such as B, C, D, F, G, and so on.

## Practice
Try saying the vowels out loud: A, E, I, O, U!
